scorecard_summary: Keep proposal artifacts, change packages, registry contracts, and review handoff inputs aligned.

acceptance_criteria: The repo must define a local project registry entry with workflow, validation, scorecards, and merge policy defaults.
Proposal generation must emit a structured artifact and scaffold a deterministic change package.
Review handoff inputs must keep baseline, candidate, guardrails, validation, evidence, and governance explicit.
Do not regress missing_contracts from the recorded baseline.
story.handoff_markdown:
## Improvement Summary

Project
template

Vector
automation-harness-health

Recommendation
keep_monitoring

Observed Signals
- missing_contracts: 0
- baseline: 0
- pass: true
- guardrails: passed

Hypothesis
Making the planning and review contracts explicit in the template lets downstream systems compile safer project-local harnesses instead of relying on prompt prose.

Success Metric
- automation-harness-health missing_contracts (min)
- preserve or improve on baseline 0

Change Package
- change id: improve-automation-harness-health
- status: not_created
- proposal: changes/improve-automation-harness-health/proposal.md
- design: changes/improve-automation-harness-health/design.md
- tasks: changes/improve-automation-harness-health/tasks.md

Acceptance Criteria
- The repo must define a local project registry entry with workflow, validation, scorecards, and merge policy defaults.
- Proposal generation must emit a structured artifact and scaffold a deterministic change package.
- Review handoff inputs must keep baseline, candidate, guardrails, validation, evidence, and governance explicit.
- Preserve guardrail status for automation-harness-health.
- Do not regress missing_contracts from the recorded baseline.

Validation
- deno task score --vector automation-harness-health
- deno task propose --vector automation-harness-health
- deno task validate
- deno task score --vector docs-hygiene
- deno task score --vector runtime-boot

Evidence
- docs/generated/improvement/automation-harness-health-score.json
- docs/generated/improvement/automation-harness-health-baseline.json

Governance
- risk tier: moderate
- merge policy: one_human
- review required: true
- workflow contract: AGENTS.md

Summary
Keep the template's planning and review contracts explicit and mechanically verifiable.
story.hypothesis: Making the planning and review contracts explicit in the template lets downstream systems compile safer project-local harnesses instead of relying on prompt prose.
story.summary: Keep the template's planning and review contracts explicit and mechanically verifiable.
story.title: Improve automation harness health
